keel-read.description: Read and search projectRoot; deny writes, external paths, and unclassified shell commands.

keel-explore.description: Read and search anywhere on the filesystem; deny writes, mutations, and unclassified shell commands. Blocked paths (secrets, keys, .git internals) are always denied.

keel-plan.description: Read and search anywhere; write docs/, CONTEXT.md, and /tmp/pi-work/ for downloading and reviewing external resources. Mutations and unclassified commands require one-time approval. No source-tree writes.

keel-code.description: Read and search projectRoot; write source, test paths, and /tmp/pi-work/ for downloaded dependencies and reference code. Mutations and unclassified commands require one-time approval.

keel-develop.description: Read and search anywhere; write project files. Known mutations are allowed and unclassified commands require approval. Blocked paths and .git are always denied.

keel-query.description: Read and search anywhere; write project files. Every known mutation and unclassified shell command requires one-time approval. Blocked paths and .git are always denied.
